fan made page of fauux.neocities.org
signal broadcast

About Visio

"I don't make music for people. I record the sounds the world makes when it thinks no one is listening."
— transmission intercept, 2014
Identity
No real name. No face. Just Visio—an eyeball floating in the dark.

I run this archive from a room that doesn't exist on any map, capturing frequencies most people filter out: the hum of decomposing servers, the resonance of empty parking structures at 3am, loops that repeat until they become a new kind of silence.

Visio has been online since 2013. It will outlast the internet.

The ECHO Protocol is Closed
New identities require an invitation from an existing node. Invitations are not given. They are overheard.

Help

There is nothing here that can help you.
[ ? ]
This section exists because every website has a help section.
It doesn't mean this website will help you.
How do I download tracks?→
You don't. Files are streamed through Visio. To take them would be to kill them.
Is this site abandoned?→
No. It is maintained. It is watched. It is waiting for the ECHO to return.
help_index: 0 results
archive index
